zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Mortimer於1313年出生在英國賀福爾維格莫時，她的父親Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March26歲，母親Joan de Geneville27歲。她於1330年6月20日之前與Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison在英國賀福爾維格莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1347年在英國賀福爾伊頓 畢曉普享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾姆 馬可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche de Mortimer于1313年出生在英国賀福爾維格莫时，她的父亲Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March26岁，母亲Joan de Geneville27岁。她于1330年6月20日之前与Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison在英国賀福爾維格莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1347年在英国賀福爾伊頓 畢曉普享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾姆 馬可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Mortimer was born in 1313, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, her father, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, was 26 and her mother, Joan de Geneville, was 27. She married Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison before 20 June 1330, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1347, in Eaton Bishop, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Mortimer est née en 1313, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan de Geneville, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison avant 20 juin 1330, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1347, à Eaton Bishop, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche de Mortimer 1313 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March 26 und ihre Mutter Joan de Geneville 27. Sie hat vor 20. Juni 1330 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1347 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Eaton Bishop, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Mortimer è nata il nel 1313 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joan de Geneville, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison prima del 20 giugno 1330, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1347, nel Eaton Bishop, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Mortimerが1313年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of Marchは26歳，母Joan de Genevilleは27歳であった。1330年6月20日以前にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーでPeter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1347年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアトン ビショップで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアムチ マルクルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Mortimer(이)가 1313년 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Geneville(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1330년 6월 20일 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1347년 영국 허퍼드실르 이턴 비숍에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 무치 마클에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Mortimer nasceu em 1313, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Geneville, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison antes 20 de junho de 1330, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1347, em Eaton Bishop, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England: Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Mortimer родилась в 1313 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Geneville, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison перед 20 июнь 1330 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1347 г. в местности эатон бишоп, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche de Mortimer nació en 1313, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan de Geneville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison antes de 20 de junio de 1330, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1347, en Eaton Bishop, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
